items.title: Turkish Lira: Political stress and energy shock drive weaker Lira – MUFG
items.summary: MUFG analysts see growing downside risks for the Turkish Lira (TRY) versus the US Dollar (USD) as domestic politics and an energy-driven terms-of-trade shock strain Turkey’s external position.

items.title: Forex Today: Australian inflation takes centre stage alongside geopolitics
